notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza grounds into a double play, third baseman Nolan Arenado to second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman LuJames Groover. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Oswald Peraza out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mike Trout GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mike Trout grounds into a double play, second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman LuJames Groover. Zach Neto out at 2nd. Mike Trout out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mike Trout rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mike Trout grounds into a double play, second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman LuJames Groover. Zach Neto out at 2nd. Mike Trout out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, third baseman Nolan Arenado to second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman LuJames Groover. Zach Neto to 3rd. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, third baseman Nolan Arenado to second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman LuJames Groover. Zach Neto to 3rd. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Lawlar reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Brett Kerry. Jordan Lawlar to 2nd. Jordan Lawlar advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Brett Kerry.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Lawlar reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Brett Kerry. Jordan Lawlar to 2nd. Jordan Lawlar advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Brett Kerry.

notableEvents.label: Corbin Carroll grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll hits a grand slam (13) to right field. Tommy Troy scores. Ketel Marte scores. Geraldo Perdomo scores.

notableEvents.label: Corbin Carroll GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Geraldo Perdomo out at 2nd. Corbin Carroll out at 1st.
